title: mistake stale design staleness reconcile
purpose: G5.5 defines mistake stale design staleness reconcile for the agent-driven expert system. Verification & quality — evidence, goal_verify, anti-mistake.
scope: Owns `G5.5` only; siblings under `G5` must not duplicate this spec.
Aligns with minimal HITL: H1 plan, H2 blocker, H3 sign-off ([INTRO-1.2](INTRO-1.2-human-touchpoint-contract-h1-h2-h3.md)).
Conflicts resolve in favor of [Vision §9 — Branch G — Verification & quality plane (anti-mistake)](../../full-automation-vision-and-hierarchy.md#9-branch-g-verification-quality-plane-anti-mistake).
behavior_steps: After H1 approves a plan, pursuit binds `pipeline_id` and phase order from [C1](C1-index.md) in `state.json`; each wake executes exactly one phase skill (spec through implement) per [C2](C2-index.md) inside goal autopilot—not as a detached manual SDLC.

Task cards from [C3](C3-index.md) scope economy worker turns; when `evidence_required` is true, [verify-router](G1.1-task-verify-router-verifier.md) must set `last_verify: passed` before `next_action` advances past the current implement task.

Program mode fans parallel lanes from work orders and the integration manifest per [C4](C4-index.md); the conductor orchestrates ready lanes without clearing manifest or milestone gates without explicit H1 approval.

Per-task evidence and definition-of-done from [C5](C5-index.md) roll up toward goal_verify per [C3.4](C3.4-task-to-goal-rollup-percent-goal-verify.md)—passing individual tasks does not close the goal without Plane G aggregation.
If a design gate is pending, task evidence is missing, or workers would edit out-of-scope paths, Plane C halts at H2 fail-closed rather than marking phases complete or skipping to implement.
edge_cases: Operator closes laptop mid-loop â€” state.json must resume from last good dual-write.
Concurrent manual edit to queue JSON â€” conductor reloads queue each wake; last writer wins with journal note.
Flaky test â€” escalation S4 once, then H2 with evidence log; no silent retry loop.
Edge case `G5.5` variant 4: verify state dual-write before continuing pursuit.
Pass 3: add regression test or evidence path specific to `G5.5`.
Pass 3: cross-link related nodes in same branch index.
failure_modes: **Silent stop:** Agent ends turn without updating queue â†’ mitigated by /loop + check-hierarchy-queue.py EMPTY gate.
**False complete:** Item marked done without artifact â†’ audit-hierarchy-depth.py re-enqueues deepen pass.
**Scope bleed:** Worker edits journal/state during planning-only expansion â†’ forbidden in vision-expansion-prompt.
**Stale design:** Upstream vision Â§ changes â†’ reconcile-stale adds deepen items for affected ids.
implementation: Extend verify-router for goal-level suite invocation.
Wire CI: validate-workflow checks goal block when pursuit.mode=goal_autopilot.
Validate `G5.5` against SEC-15 release checklist and parent index links.
Document `G5.5` in parent index with verify command and release tag.
Add checklist row in SEC-15 release doc for `G5.5`.
acceptance: [ ] Named script, skill, or test path exists or is listed in SEC-15 release row
narrative: G5.5 defines mistake stale design staleness reconcile for the agent-driven expert system. Verification & quality — evidence, goal_verify, anti-mistake. In practice, the system after h1 approves a plan, pursuit binds `pipeline_id` and phase order from [c1](c1-index.md) in `state.json`; each wake executes exactly one phase skill (spec through implement) per [c2](c2-index.md) inside goal autopilot—not as a detached manual sdlc, then task cards from [c3](c3-index.md) scope economy worker turns; when `evidence_required` is true, [verify-router](g1.1-task-verify-router-verifier.md) must set `last_verify: passed` before `next_action` advances past the current implement task.
reader_narrative:
<!-- prose-source: agent plane-g 2026-06-28 -->

Stale design is implementing against outdated HLD, DD, or integration manifest while staleness graph marks dependents stale. Controls: reconcile-stale skill, reconcile-artifact-graph in program mode, and [G4.4](G4.4-review-staleness-reconciliation-before-merge.md) merge gate.

Upstream vision or spec changes bump staleness; implement must pause or re-run design phases per journal next_action. Silent implement on stale nodes violates compose-first and expert-system integrity.
